

## Summary of findings

```{r prepare_summary_stats}
#| echo: false
#| eval: true

color_none  <- cpsr::color_palette[['none']]
color_path  <- color_none
color_vus   <- color_none
color_benign <- color_none

n_path_clinvar_asserted <- 0
n_path_cpsr_asserted <- 0
n_vus <- 0
n_benign <- 0
biomarker_genes_affected <- data.frame()
path_genes_affected <- data.frame()
pgx_genes_affected <- data.frame()
sf_genes_affected <- data.frame()

if(NROW(cps_report$content$snv_indel$callset$variant_display$cpg_non_sf) > 0){
  n_path_clinvar_asserted <- 
    cps_report$content$snv_indel$callset$variant_display$cpg_non_sf |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$ASSERTION_AUTHORITY == "ClinVar" &
                    (.data$CLASSIFICATION == "Pathogenic" |
                    .data$CLASSIFICATION == "Likely Pathogenic")) |>
    NROW()
  n_path_cpsr_asserted <- 
    cps_report$content$snv_indel$callset$variant_display$cpg_non_sf |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$ASSERTION_AUTHORITY == "CPSR" & 
                    (.data$CLASSIFICATION == "Pathogenic" |
                    .data$CLASSIFICATION == "Likely Pathogenic")) |>
    NROW()
  n_vus <- cps_report$content$snv_indel$callset$variant_display$cpg_non_sf |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$CLASSIFICATION == "VUS") |>
    NROW()
  
  n_benign <- cps_report$content$snv_indel$callset$variant_display$cpg_non_sf |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$CLASSIFICATION == "Benign" |
                    .data$CLASSIFICATION == "Likely Benign") |>
    NROW()
  
  path_genes_affected <- 
    dplyr::filter(
      cps_report$content$snv_indel$callset$variant$cpg_non_sf, 
      .data$CLASSIFICATION == "Pathogenic" |
        .data$CLASSIFICATION == "Likely Pathogenic") |> 
    dplyr::select("SYMBOL") |>
    dplyr::distinct() |>
    utils::head(3)
  
}


if(NROW(cps_report$content$snv_indel$callset$variant$biomarker) > 0){
  biomarker_genes_affected <- 
    cps_report$content$snv_indel$callset$variant$biomarker |>
    dplyr::select("SYMBOL") |>
    dplyr::distinct() |>
    utils::head(3)
    
}

if(NROW(cps_report$content$snv_indel$callset$variant$sf) > 0){
  sf_genes_affected <- 
    cps_report$content$snv_indel$callset$variant$sf |> 
    dplyr::select("SYMBOL") |>
    dplyr::distinct() |>
    utils::head(3)
}
  
if(NROW(cps_report$content$snv_indel$callset$variant$pgx) > 0){
  pgx_genes_affected <- 
    cps_report$content$snv_indel$callset$variant$pgx |> 
    dplyr::select("SYMBOL") |>
    dplyr::distinct() |>
    utils::head(3)
}

if ((n_path_clinvar_asserted + n_path_cpsr_asserted) > 0) {
  color_path <- cpsr::color_palette$pathogenicity$values[5]   # #9E0142 deep red
}
if (n_vus > 0) {
  color_vus <- cpsr::color_palette$pathogenicity$values[3]    # #2c313c dark gray
}
if (n_benign > 0) {
  color_benign <- cpsr::color_palette$pathogenicity$values[1] # #077009 dark green
}

value_path_genes <- "None"
color_path_genes <- color_none

if(NROW(path_genes_affected) > 0){
  value_path_genes <- 
    paste(path_genes_affected$SYMBOL, collapse="/")
  color_path_genes <- 
    cpsr::color_palette$pathogenicity$values[5]
  if(NROW(path_genes_affected) == 3){
    value_path_genes = "> 2"
  }
}

color_sf <- color_none
value_sf <- "Not determined"
if(as.logical(cps_report$settings$conf$variant_classification$secondary_findings) == TRUE){
  value_sf <- "None"
  if(cps_report$content$snv_indel$v_stat_sf$n > 0 & NROW(sf_genes_affected) > 0){
    value_sf = 
      paste(sf_genes_affected$SYMBOL, collapse="/")
    if(NROW(sf_genes_affected) == 3){
      value_sf = "> 2"
    }
    color_sf <- cpsr::color_palette$pathogenicity$values[5]
  }
}

color_biomarker_pgx <- color_none
value_biomarker_pgx <- "None"
if(NROW(biomarker_genes_affected) > 0 | NROW(pgx_genes_affected) > 0){
  biomarker_pgx_genes_affected <- 
    dplyr::bind_rows(
      biomarker_genes_affected,
      pgx_genes_affected
    )
  
  value_biomarker_pgx = 
    paste(biomarker_pgx_genes_affected$SYMBOL, collapse="/")
  if(NROW(biomarker_pgx_genes_affected) > 2){
    value_biomarker_pgx = "> 2"
  }
  color_biomarker_pgx <- cpsr::color_palette[['report']]  # teal: actionable, not pathogenic
}

```

```{r summary_cpsr_findings}
#| output: asis
#| echo: false
#| eval: true

bslib::layout_column_wrap(
  width = 1/3,
  height = 120,
  bslib::value_box(
    title = "Genes with pathogenic variants",
    value = value_path_genes,
    showcase = cpsr::bs_icon2("bullseye"),
    theme = bslib::value_box_theme(
      bg = color_path_genes, fg = "#fff"),
    showcase_layout = "left center"
  ),
  bslib::value_box(
    title = "Genes with biomarkers/PgX findings",
    value = value_biomarker_pgx,
    showcase = cpsr::bs_icon2("bullseye"),
    theme = bslib::value_box_theme(
      bg = color_biomarker_pgx, fg = "#fff"),
    showcase_layout = "left center"
  ),
  bslib::value_box(
    title = "Genes with secondary findings",
    value = value_sf,
    showcase = cpsr::bs_icon2("bullseye"),
    theme = bslib::value_box_theme(
      bg = color_sf, fg = "#fff"),
    showcase_layout = "left center"
  )
)

bslib::layout_column_wrap(
  width = 1/3,
  height = 120,
  bslib::value_box(
    title = "Pathogenic/Likely pathogenic variants",
    value = paste0("N = ", n_path_clinvar_asserted + n_path_cpsr_asserted),
    showcase = cpsr::bs_icon2("check-square"),
    theme = bslib::value_box_theme(
      bg = color_path, fg = "#fff"),
    showcase_layout = "left center"
  ),
  bslib::value_box(
    title = "VUS variants",
    value = paste0("N = ", n_vus),
    showcase = cpsr::bs_icon2("check-square"),
    theme = bslib::value_box_theme(
      bg = color_vus, fg = "#fff"),
    showcase_layout = "left center"
  ),
  bslib::value_box(
    title = "Benign/Likely benign variants",
    value = paste0("N = ", n_benign),
    showcase = cpsr::bs_icon2("check-square"),
    theme = bslib::value_box_theme(
      bg = color_benign, fg = "#fff"),
    showcase_layout = "left center"
  )
)
```
<br>

### Variant statistics 

```{r num_cpg_targets}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false

primary_targets <- 
  cps_report[['settings']][['conf']][['gene_panel']][['panel_genes']] |>
  dplyr::filter(PRIMARY_TARGET == T) |>
  dplyr::select(ENTREZGENE) |>
  dplyr::distinct()
```

Variant numbers in the targeted cancer predisposition genes (n = `r NROW(primary_targets)`)

* Number of SNVs: __`r cps_report$content$snv_indel[['v_stat_cpg_non_sf']][['n_snv']]`__
* Number of InDels: __`r cps_report$content$snv_indel[['v_stat_cpg_non_sf']][['n_indel']]`__
* Number of protein-coding variants: __`r cps_report$content$snv_indel[['v_stat_cpg_non_sf']][['n_coding']]`__

<br>
